steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for ELECTRO ACO ALTONA S.A. indicators
from decimal import Decimal
# Given data
price = Decimal('12.98')
shares = Decimal('22500')
# Balance sheet latest (2025-03-31)
ativo_total = Decimal('644494000.0')
ativo_circulante = Decimal('276196000.0')
caixa = Decimal('10115000.0')
aplic_fin = Decimal('68000.0')
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
estoques = Decimal('97157000.0')
tributos_rec = Decimal('44135000.0')
# Noncurrent etc
patrimonio_liq = Decimal('337052000.0')
# Debt: current + noncurrent loans
emp_curr = Decimal('73149000.0')
emp_noncurr = Decimal('35581000.0')
div_bruta = emp_curr + emp_noncurr
# Income statement: quarterly and annual
# Annual 2024
rev_2024 = Decimal('564238000.0')
ebit_2024 = Decimal('101077000.0')
net_2024 = Decimal('66541000.0')
# Q1 2025
rev_q1_2025 = Decimal('152175000.0')
ebit_q1_2025 = Decimal('41240000.0')
net_q1_2025 = Decimal('41606000.0')
# Q1 2024
rev_q1_2024 = Decimal('128901000.0')
ebit_q1_2024 = Decimal('20990000.0')
net_q1_2024 = Decimal('13398000.0')
# Depreciation: annual 2024 and q1 2025/q1 2024
depr_2024 = Decimal('23961000.0')
depr_q1_2025 = Decimal('5760000.0')
depr_q1_2024 = Decimal('5680000.0')

# TTM (trailing twelve months) calculations
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
# TTM depreciation
depr_ttm = depr_2024 + depr_q1_2025 - depr_q1_2024
# EBITDA TTM
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm
# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares
# Net debt
div_liq = div_bruta - disponibilidades
EV = market_cap + div_liq

# Per-share metrics
lpa = net_ttm / shares
vpa = patrimonio_liq / shares
ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / shares
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / shares
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - Decimal('216695000.0') # passivo circulante
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa
p_vp = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / rev_per_share
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro  # assume same
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_ttm
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_ttm

marg_bruta = ( (rev_2024 + Decimal('41865000.0') - Decimal('38242000.0')) / rev_ttm ) if True else None
# But better compute Resultado Bruto TTM using annual and Q1 adjustments
res_bruto_2024 = Decimal('167359000.0')
res_bruto_q1_2025 = Decimal('41865000.0')
res_bruto_q1_2024 = Decimal('38242000.0')
res_bruto_ttm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
marg_bruta = res_bruto_ttm / rev_ttm
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm

ebit_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo_total
# ROIC: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
fornecedores = Decimal('31135000.0')
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - disponibilidades
roic = ebit_ttm / roic_denom
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio_liq
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / Decimal('216695000.0')
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total

# 3-month metrics: use quarter values (Q1 2025)
rev_3m = rev_q1_2025
ebit_3m = ebit_q1_2025
net_3m = net_q1_2025

# Prepare results dictionary
results = {
    'Ativo': float(ativo_total),
    'Disponibilidades': float(disponibilidades),
    'Ativo Circulante': float(ativo_circulante),
    'Dív. Bruta': float(div_bruta),
    'Dív. Líquida': float(div_liq),
    'Patrim. Lq': float(patrimonio_liq),
    'Receita Lida (12 meses)': float(rev_ttm),
    'EBIT (12 meses)': float(ebit_ttm),
    'Lucro Lido (12 meses)': float(net_ttm),
    'Receita Lida (3 meses)': float(rev_3m),
    'EBIT (3 meses)': float(ebit_3m),
    'Lucro Lido (3 meses)': float(net_3m),
    'P/L': float(pl),
    'P/VP': float(p_vp),
    'P/EBIT': float(p_ebit),
    'PSR': float(psr),
    'P/Ativos': float(p_ativos),
    'P/Cap. Giro': float(p_cap_giro),
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': float(p_ativ_circ_liq),
    'EV / EBITDA': float(ev_ebitda),
    'EV / EBIT': float(ev_ebit),
    'LPA': float(lpa),
    'VPA': float(vpa),
    'Marg. Bruta': float(marg_bruta),
    'Marg. EBIT': float(marg_ebit),
    'Marg. L�quida': float(marg_liq),
    'EBIT / Ativo': float(ebit_ativo),
    'ROIC': float(roic),
    'ROE': float(roe),
    'Liquidez Corr': float(liquidez_corr),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': float(divbr_patrim),
    'Giro Ativos': float(giro_ativos),
    'Market Cap': float(market_cap),
    'EV': float(EV),
}

# Print nicely
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.output: {'status': 'error', 'report': 'Failed to run code: embedded null byte'}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"import json
# Values from previous calculation (recomputed here to be safe)
from decimal import Decimal
price = Decimal('12.98')
shares = Decimal('22500')
ativo_total = Decimal('644494000.0')
ativo_circulante = Decimal('276196000.0')
caixa = Decimal('10115000.0')
aplic_fin = Decimal('68000.0')
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
patrimonio_liq = Decimal('337052000.0')
emp_curr = Decimal('73149000.0')
emp_noncurr = Decimal('35581000.0')
div_bruta = emp_curr + emp_noncurr
rev_2024 = Decimal('564238000.0')
ebit_2024 = Decimal('101077000.0')
net_2024 = Decimal('66541000.0')
rev_q1_2025 = Decimal('152175000.0')
ebit_q1_2025 = Decimal('41240000.0')
net_q1_2025 = Decimal('41606000.0')
rev_q1_2024 = Decimal('128901000.0')
ebit_q1_2024 = Decimal('20990000.0')
net_q1_2024 = Decimal('13398000.0')
depr_2024 = Decimal('23961000.0')
depr_q1_2025 = Decimal('5760000.0')
depr_q1_2024 = Decimal('5680000.0')

rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
depr_ttm = depr_2024 + depr_q1_2025 - depr_q1_2024
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + depr_ttm
market_cap = price * shares
div_liq = div_bruta - disponibilidades
EV = market_cap + div_liq

# per-share
lpa = net_ttm / shares
vpa = patrimonio_liq / shares

ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / shares
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / shares
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares
passivo_circulante = Decimal('216695000.0')
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares

pl = price / lpa
p_vp = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / rev_per_share
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro

res_bruto_2024 = Decimal('167359000.0')
res_bruto_q1_2025 = Decimal('41865000.0')
res_bruto_q1_2024 = Decimal('38242000.0')
res_bruto_ttm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
marg_bruta = res_bruto_ttm / rev_ttm
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm

ebit_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo_total
fornecedores = Decimal('31135000.0')
roic = ebit_ttm / (ativo_total - fornecedores - disponibilidades)
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio_liq
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total

# 3-months
rev_3m = rev_q1_2025
ebit_3m = ebit_q1_2025
net_3m = net_q1_2025

# Format percentages as percent values with two decimals
def pct(x):
    return round(float(x * 100), 2)

out = [
    {"indicator":"Ativo","value":float(ativo_total)},
    {"indicator":"Disponibilidades","value":float(disponibilidades)},
    {"indicator":"Ativo Circulante","value":float(ativo_circulante)},
    {"indicator":"Dív. Bruta" if False else "Dí v. Bruta","value":float(div_bruta)},
]
# The above attempted trick failed; instead use exact enum names from spec
indicators_order = [
"Ativo","Disponibilidades","Ativo Circulante","Dí?","Dí?",]
print('done')
"} }
